commentaries.author: Aquinas Study Bible
commentaries.content: The Apostle Paul had a similar experience in the Book of Acts, in that while the others could see nothing, he alone beheld the vision (Acts 22:9).

commentaries.author: Hippolytus of Rome
commentaries.content: For it is to His saints that fear Him, and to them alone, that He reveals Himself. For if any one seems to be living now in the Church, and yet has not the fear of God, his companionship with the saints will avail him nothing.

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: The Apostle Paul had a similar experience in the Book of Acts, in that while the others could see nothing, he alone beheld the vision.

advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
